flashcards.back: A four-layered model that was developed by the Department of Defense's Advanced Research Projects Agency (ARPA).
A seven-layered model that was developed by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO).
The concept of dividing a complex system into smaller, more manageable layers.

flashcards.front: What is the Application Layer of the TCP/IP model responsible for?
What is the Network Layer of the OSI model responsible for?
flashcards.back: Routing data between devices on different networks.
